quiz.question:
White plays Ra1, controlling the 1st rank. 

Who is better and why?

answers.text: White is better because the rooks can win the c-pawn.

feedback.text: In short, yes. It's going to be hard to defend the c-pawn, and even if Black loses it and gives the queen for both rooks, White has 2 more pawns on the kingside.

distractors.text: Black is winning because the c-pawn is dangerous and will threaten to queen.

feedback.text: The c-pawn cannot be supported sufficiently against both rooks. Imagine this plan: Rd2, Rc2 and then Rac1.

distractors.text: This should be a draw. The queen can attack the rooks and check the king for the draw.

feedback.text: The king is really safe and the rooks can help each other out.
